# LeakSanitizer suppressions for fastjson CI.
#
# Format: "leak:<substring>" — substring must appear in any frame of
# the leak's stack trace.
#
# This file is intentionally empty at landing — fastjson's leak surface
# has not surfaced any process-lifetime allocations under the ASan
# CI job to date. Entries are added narrowly as known-good leaks are
# identified (e.g. vendored-library MINIT singletons). Prefer adding
# a narrow entry here over flipping ASAN_OPTIONS detect_leaks=0 in
# .github/workflows/tests.yml — see
# ~/ai/wiki/debugging/asan-php-extension.md for the recipe.
#
# To audit a new leak locally:
#   ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_leaks=1 LSAN_OPTIONS=fast_unwind_on_malloc=0 \
#     <asan-php> -d extension=fastjson.so -r '<repro>'
